name: supply-chain-game
description: Team-based supply chain simulation game: forecast vs actual, transport tradeoffs, inventory aging, and CEO-led make-vs-buy trading. React + Vite on Netlify, Supabase backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "tsx scripts/dev-local.ts" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w client
